shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The City of Scranton has reached an agreement with its Department of Public Works (DPW) employees. City officials say the union's members voted overwhelmingly to approve the new contract on Monday. Authorities say the city will have greater flexibility to send DPW staff to make sure the city's needs are [...]
shorts.content: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The City of Scranton has reached an agreement with its Department of Public Works (DPW) employees. Authorities say the city will have greater flexibility to send DPW staff to make sure the city's needs are [...]

shorts.description: CLARKS SUMMIT, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — After an extensive investigation, authorities say a Clarks Summit man was arrested and is facing child pornography charges in Lackawanna County. Lackawanna County District Attorney Brian Gallagher alleges 32-year-old Jonathan Johnson from Clarks Summit shared and possessed files showing sexual abuse of children. shorts.title_distilled: 28/22 Sports Night talks G-Mac to Cuse, March Madness.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU)— A local NEPA basketball legend will return to his alma mater after an impressive showing in March Madness, and turning the Siena Bulldogs around. Gerry McNamara will be going back to Syracuse University, attempting to resurrect the ACC basketball powerhouse to its glory days. We'll also discuss the first weekend of March Madness, NEPA's basketball [...]
